response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and entrepreneurial background, aligning well with technical innovation and leadership. However, the resume lacks explicit AI/ML expertise, recognized AI products/platforms, or director-level leadership in strategic roles. The AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is promising but not yet sufficient to meet the AI Strategy focus. The entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is valuable but not directly in AI.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across multiple languages and domains (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, JavaScript, etc.)
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, showing product development and open-source contributions
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, developer tooling) at re:cinq and low-latency systems at Dunnhumby
concerns: No explicit AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products/platforms in the resume
Lacks director-level experience or strategic leadership roles in AI/cloud strategy
No advanced degree (MS/PhD) in AI-related field, which is preferred

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise and recognized AI products
